text.title: Retainer Renewal Decision Rule Procedure
text.summary: Five-step quarterly procedure: collect inputs → apply thresholds → record + sign → quarterly review → calibrate.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.input: Finance export + utilisation report + NPS survey

step.name: apply-thresholds
step.action: Run `apply-thresholds`. Map (margin, utilisation, NPS, strategic_fit) tuple → decision: keep | upsell | renegotiate | kill per the decision tree.

step.name: record-and-sign
step.action: Attach evidence (transcript, P&L line, NPS survey). Founder signs the record (signature anchor); ambiguous decisions ("kept because they like us") rejected.

step.name: quarterly-review
step.input: Last 4 quarters of decisions + outcomes (kept-but-still-loss?, killed-but-recovered?)
step.action: Run `outcome-review-synthesis`. Misses (kept loss-maker that stayed loss-maker) trigger threshold recalibration.

step.name: calibrate
step.action: Increment version. Publish to retainer book. Notify partners + accounting.
